title: Simplebeacon EU AI Act Readiness Assessment — [Company / Repo Name]

executiveSummary.headline: One sentence: e.g. 2 Annex III high-risk indicators and 3 Article 50 transparency gaps — documentation artifacts missing.

euAiActSummary.deadlineNote: High-risk AI systems must comply with EU AI Act requirements by August 2026

items.description: Employment or recruitment AI decision pattern (Annex III area)
items.recommendedAction: Document Annex III classification, conduct FRIA, and implement high-risk system requirements

euAiAct.summary: Annex III high-risk patterns, Article 50 transparency gaps, or missing documentation.

productionLeaks.summary: No mock/sample path references in production directories.

immediate: Conduct formal Annex III classification review with legal counsel
Add Article 50 user-facing AI disclosure to chat and generative output surfaces
beforeAugust2026: Implement human-in-the-loop review for high-risk automated decisions
Add AI inference audit logging for accountability
Wire simplebeacon scan --gate --checklist eu-ai-act into CI
Prepare conformity documentation for notified body review if high-risk

keepUsing: Legal counsel for formal conformity assessment
addSimplebeaconFor: Technical signal scan for Annex III high-risk patterns
Article 50 transparency gap detection in user-facing code
Documentation completeness checks before August 2026 deadline

pilotProposal.offer: EU AI Act readiness audit + 30-day remediation sprint
pilotProposal.ask: Will you run simplebeacon scan --gate with --checklist eu-ai-act on every PR until August 2026?

disclaimer: This assessment is a static technical pattern review — not legal advice, formal conformity assessment, or certification under Regulation (EU) 2024/1689. Client remains responsible for legal classification and regulatory compliance.
